title: GIST Society of Automotive Engineers, Korea (GIST)
description: Established a student-created automobile club and led steering-system design and manufacturing. Funded by GIST over $10,000.

title: GIST Student Creative Activity Support Initiative, Korea (GIST)
description: Produced and distributed activity videos under a COVID-19 student club support program. Funded by GIST over $4,500.

title: GIST Broadcasting Station, Korea (GIST)
description: Established a video production station and managed filming/editing for school promotions and student activities. Funded by GIST over $30,000.

title: GIST Human Rights Center, Korea (GIST)
description: Conducted research on law, ethics, morality, and philosophy of law.
